name: 1916 Seachtar Dearmadta
overview: This series looks at the seven men who were killed in Kilmainham Jail as a result of the 1916 Easter Rising. The people of Ireland have forgotten these men. This is an ambitious series with high standards of information from history to educational to cultural. The seven men are Sean Heuston, Con Colbert, Willie Pearse, Major John McBride, Ned Daly, Michael Mallin and Michael O'Hanrahan.

trailers.title: The Men Who Died & Lived in the Shadow....1916 Seachtar Dearmadtha #TG4
